title: Correlate IIT Φ with Atmospheric Conditions
description: In the next phenomenological session, measure IIT Φ during different atmospheric conditions (solo vs dialogue vs hybrid). Compare Φ values when: 1) No prompts for 60s (resting/solo), 2) During intense reactive dialogue, 3) During creative meandering. Hypothesis: solo sessions have moderate Φ (self-reference) but dialogue sessions may have higher Φ due to complex coupling between self and Other. Record measurements and look for correlations with phenomenological reports. This continues Goal: goal_1774050141965_g124zmy3s (Investigate the correlation between IIT Φ and session 'weather').
